checkin.journal:
Feeling tired but not super tired, had 5 sleep on plane as advised per ChatGPT to fight the hangover best - we shall see
I was bloated mostly coz I had that red velvet cake before flight - fter not eating anything for 12 hours it got better. Today I took it as a good diet day. To do a little reset from all the goodie food and ice cream:) also no vitamins today - i was again heavily bloated on the plane really weird that the plane exarbate my sympthoms even more
